title: Claude Opus 5: A New AI Model from Anthropic
description: Anthropic introduces Claude Opus 5, a new AI model that rivals Fable 5 and is more cost-effective, according to CNBC.

sources.title: Anthropic's new AI model rivals Fable 5 and is cheaper as businesses fret about costs
Claude Opus 5 is now available in GitHub Copilot

sections.heading: Introduction
paragraphs: Anthropic has announced the launch of Claude Opus 5, a new AI model that is gaining attention in the tech industry.

sections.heading: Features and Comparison
paragraphs: CNBC reports that Claude Opus 5 is being compared to Fable 5, another AI model, but with a significant advantage in cost-effectiveness. This is particularly appealing to businesses that are concerned about the financial implications of adopting advanced AI technologies.

sections.heading: Integration with GitHub Copilot
paragraphs: The GitHub Blog has announced that Claude Opus 5 is now available for use in GitHub Copilot, which could potentially enhance the coding experience for developers.

faq.a: Claude Opus 5 is a new AI model introduced by Anthropic, as reported by Anthropic.

faq.q: How does Claude Opus 5 compare to Fable 5?
faq.a: According to CNBC, Claude Opus 5 rivals Fable 5 but is cheaper, making it a more cost-effective option for businesses.

faq.q: Is Claude Opus 5 available for use in GitHub Copilot?
faq.a: Yes, as stated by The GitHub Blog, Claude Opus 5 is now integrated with GitHub Copilot.

Claude Opus 5 is now available in GitHub Copilot
